sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113320" key="xando/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χανδός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n113320.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">yawning, roomy,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐκ χανδῆς ζωροποτῶν κύλικος</foreign> Epigr. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0586.tlg001:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">79</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
